creator: randomnoise058@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 177013
VLC_error_messages_host_DVD_playback.log

First of all: KUDOS to FreeBSD VirtualBox maintainers. Version 5.18 is AWESOME!

Established VBox CentOS Guest connection with FBSD Host physical DVD. CentOS VBox guest successfully recognizes host DVD insertion and successfully mounts said media.

Attempts to playback host movie DVD results in numerous sense errors and a handful of "Buffer I/O" errors. Log of playback attempt included as an attachment to this report.

VBox Guest VLC is unable to successfully play host movie DVD.

FWIW - host VLC has no problem with movie DVD playback.
